executives.name: Sridhar Ramaswamy
executives.background: Sridhar Ramaswamy has served as our Chief Executive Officer and as a member of our board of directors since February 2024. Prior to that, he served as our Senior Vice President, AI since May 2023. From 2019 to May 2023, Mr. Ramaswamy was the co-founder and Chief Executive Officer of Neeva Inc. Prior to that, he held various roles at Google from 2003 to 2018, most recently as Senior Vice President, Ads & Commerce.

executives.name: Michael P. Scarpelli
executives.background: Michael P. Scarpelli has served as our Chief Financial Officer since August 2019. From 2011 to 2019, Mr. Scarpelli served as Chief Financial Officer of ServiceNow, Inc. From 2009 to 2011, he served as Senior Vice President of Finance and Business Operations of the Backup Recovery Systems Division of EMC Corporation.

executives.name: Benoit Dageville
executives.background: Benoit Dageville is one of our co-founders and has served as our President, Product since July 2019 and as a member of our board of directors since 2012. From 2012 to 2019, Mr. Dageville served as our Chief Technology Officer. Prior to that, he held various engineering roles at Oracle Corporation.

executives.name: Christian Kleinerman
executives.background: Christian Kleinerman has served as our Executive Vice President, Product Management since April 2024, and previously served as our Senior Vice President, Product Management since 2017. Prior to joining Snowflake, he held various product management roles at Google and Microsoft.

executives.name: Grzegorz Czajkowski
executives.background: Grzegorz Czajkowski has served as our Executive Vice President, Engineering since April 2024, and previously served as our Senior Vice President, Engineering since 2019. Prior to that, he spent 15 years at Google in various engineering leadership roles.

board_of_directors.name: Frank Slootman
board_of_directors.background: Frank Slootman has served as Chairman of our board of directors since 2019. He served as our Chief Executive Officer from 2019 to February 2024. Previously, he was Chairman and CEO of ServiceNow and Data Domain.

board_of_directors.name: Sridhar Ramaswamy
board_of_directors.background: Chief Executive Officer of Snowflake. Former co-founder of Neeva and Google executive.

board_of_directors.name: Benoit Dageville
board_of_directors.background: Co-founder and President, Product of Snowflake.

board_of_directors.name: Jeremy Burton
board_of_directors.background: CEO of Observe, Inc. Former CMO of Dell Technologies and Executive Director at EMC.

board_of_directors.name: Teresa Briggs
board_of_directors.background: Former Vice Chair and West Region Managing Partner of Deloitte LLP.

board_of_directors.name: Stephen Hamm
board_of_directors.background: Managing Director at Hellman & Friedman. Former executive at AlixPartners.

board_of_directors.name: Mark D. McLaughlin
board_of_directors.background: Former Chairman and CEO of Palo Alto Networks. Former CEO of Verisign.

board_of_directors.name: Kelly A. Kramer
board_of_directors.background: Former EVP and CFO of Cisco Systems, Inc. Former executive at GE.

board_of_directors.name: Jayshree Ullal
board_of_directors.background: President and CEO of Arista Networks. Former Senior Vice President at Cisco.

board_of_directors.name: Mark S. Garrett
board_of_directors.background: Former EVP and CFO of Adobe Systems. Former CFO of EMC Software Group.
